title: Login Loop on Mobile
description: User enters credentials and is redirected back to the login page without an error.

title: Monthly Invoice Missing
description: Customer claims they haven't received the PDF invoice for February billing cycle.

title: API Rate Limit Error
description: Systems are returning 429 errors despite usage being under the documented limit.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Requesting a dark theme for the desktop dashboard to reduce eye strain.

title: Broken Link in Documentation
description: The 'Getting Started' guide links to a 404 page for Python SDK.

title: Database Migration Failure
description: Production database sync failed at 02:00 AM. Data integrity check needed.

title: Logo Update on Profile
description: Client wants to update their company branding across all sub-accounts.

title: Performance Lag in UI
description: Loading the 'Reports' tab takes over 15 seconds for large datasets.

title: Password Reset Email Delay
description: Users reporting it takes up to 2 hours to receive the recovery link.

title: GDPR Data Export Request
description: Customer requested a full dump of their personal data per privacy regulations.

title: Integration Auth Failure
description: Slack notification bot disconnected and won't re-authenticate.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Checkout page hangs during the 'Processing' phase for Stripe payments.
